phase: Fase 1 - Interventi a rischio zero / performance baseline
objective: Ridurre overhead DOM/debug e aggiungere baseline performance esportabile senza cambiare resa visiva, mappa, asset, rain output o sistemi core.
codeChanges: Aggiornato PERLA_BUILD_ID e testi UI/launcher a V258.
Aggiunte costanti V258 per baseline performance e garanzie no visual/worldgen/asset/rain change.
Throttling update HUD orologio/meteo a 250 ms, evitando innerHTML ogni frame quando non cambia markup.
Throttling update debugLine a 250 ms, evitando textContent ogni frame.
Aggiunto collectPerlaPerformanceBaselineV258() esportabile via window.perlaPerformanceV258() e window.__PERLA_DEBUG__.collectPerlaPerformanceBaselineV258().
Aggiunto downloadPerlaPerformanceBaselineV258() per esportare JSON runtime performance.
Aggiunto perlaLastDrawStatsSummaryV258() per snapshot leggero dei colli di bottiglia, senza alterare perlaLastDrawStats completo.

preserved.assets: no asset byte changes versus V257
preserved.DOM gameplay canvas: render loop unchanged except HUD/debug text throttling after draw

riskAssessment.debugUxChange: debug text and clock HUD refresh at 4Hz instead of every frame; gameplay/rendering unchanged
riskAssessment.notDone: No dead code deletion; no asset archive; no rain pipeline refactor; no minimap logic change.

nextRecommendedPhase: Dopo test reale V258, eventuale V259: audit/rimozione pattumiera solo su candidati confermati.

checksExecuted.nodeVmSmoke: OK: build id exported, __PERLA_DEBUG__ present, perlaPerformanceV258 present, two RAF frames executed with fake DOM/canvas
checksExecuted.headlessBrowserSmoke: attempted with Chromium/Playwright but environment blocked navigation with ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ADMINISTRATOR; not counted as app failure
